name: Group
objects: elements such as symmetries, permutations, transformations, or numbers
interpretation_note: the structure is defined by operation laws, not by the visual appearance of elements

name: Vector space
objects: vectors, functions, signals, states, or data points
laws_or_axioms: linear combination laws over a field
interpretation_note: linear structure appears across geometry, analysis, physics, economics, and data science

name: Topological space
interpretation_note: topology studies qualitative structure rather than exact measurement

name: Graph
interpretation_note: graphs model relations but the meaning of an edge depends on context

name: Category
laws_or_axioms: associativity of composition and identity laws
interpretation_note: category-level thinking centers transformations and their preservation

name: Formal system
interpretation_note: formal systems make proof inspectable but depend on chosen language and axioms
